title: Attribution Models: Same Journey, Different Conclusions
text:
The Problem

  
    📘
    Facebook Ad
  
  →
  
    🔍
    Google Search
  
  →
  
    📧
    Email Click
  
  →
  
    💰
    Purchase
  


Who gets the credit for that conversion?


The answer depends entirely on which attribution model you choose.

title: Attribution Models: Same Journey, Different Conclusions
text:
5 Attribution Models

  
    1️⃣
    First-touch
    100% to first contact
  
  
    🏁
    Last-touch
    100% to last contact
  
  
    ⚖️
    Linear
    Equal split across all
  
  
    ⏱️
    Time Decay
    More credit near conversion
  
  
    🔱
    Position-based
    40% · 20% · 40%
  



  
    First-touch
    
    100% · 0% · 0%
  
  
    Last-touch
    
    0% · 0% · 100%
  
  
    Linear
    
    
    
    33% · 33% · 33%
  
  
    Time Decay
    
    
    
    14% · 29% · 57%
  
  
    Position-based
    
    
    
    40% · 20% · 40%
  
  
    First touch
    Middle
    Last touch
  


Same customer journey. Five different answers.

title: Attribution Models: Same Journey, Different Conclusions
text:
Visualizing the Difference
One journey: Facebook → Google → Email → Purchase

title: Attribution Models: Same Journey, Different Conclusions
text:
The Numbers Can Diverge Drastically
Imagine 1,000 conversions across Facebook, Google, Email










Facebook credit: 50 → 420 depending on model chosen.

title: Attribution Models: Same Journey, Different Conclusions
text:
Which Model Should You Use?


Business Goal → Model

🎯 Brand awareness → First-touch
💰 Direct conversion → Last-touch
⚖️ Balanced view → Linear
🕐 Recency matters → Time Decay
🔁 Nurture + close → Position-based


Advanced: Spend-Weighted
Weight credit not just by position, but by how much was spent at each touchpoint.

Channels that cost more get held to a higher standard.

title: Attribution Models: Same Journey, Different Conclusions
text:
Takeaway

Attribution isn’t a statistics problem.
It’s a business decision.


The model you choose determines which channels get budget next quarter.
Choose deliberately.
